name: Bocasa Beauty Spa

items.name: Classic Full Set
items.description: Natural-looking individual lash extensions applied one-by-one for a subtle, elegant look

items.name: Volume Full Set
items.description: Multiple lightweight extensions per natural lash for a fuller, more dramatic effect

items.name: Lash Fill (2-3 weeks)
items.description: Maintenance fill to keep your lash extensions looking fresh and full

items.name: Lash Removal
items.description: Safe professional removal of eyelash extensions

items.name: Microblading Initial Session
items.description: Semi-permanent eyebrow tattooing with custom shaping and color matching, includes follow-up appointment

items.name: Microblading Touch-Up
items.description: Follow-up session to perfect your brows after initial treatment

items.name: Classic Manicure
items.description: Traditional manicure with nail shaping, cuticle care, and polish

items.name: Gel Manicure
items.description: Long-lasting gel polish manicure with chip-resistant finish

items.name: Acrylic Full Set
items.description: Full set of acrylic nail enhancements with your choice of shape and color

items.name: Classic Pedicure
items.description: Relaxing pedicure with therapeutic foot treatment, nail shaping, and polish

items.name: Gel Pedicure
items.description: Spa pedicure finished with long-lasting gel polish

about: Bocasa Beauty Spa is a premier beauty destination in Windsor Locks, CT, specializing in eyelash extensions, microblading, and professional nail services. Their skilled team of makeup artists and beauty technicians provide personalized treatments in a serene, elegant setting. Whether you are looking for natural-looking lash extensions that last up to a month, perfectly shaped semi-permanent brows through microblading, or a relaxing manicure and pedicure with gel polish or acrylics, Bocasa Beauty Spa delivers polished results with meticulous attention to detail.
features: Accepts all major credit cards & cash

designBrief.colorDirection: soft rose, champagne gold, ivory, muted mauve
designBrief.inspiration: Upscale nail salon. Soft textures, elegant type, calming palette.
designBrief.avoidance: No garish pinks or purples. No clip art nails. Must not reuse fonts from other sites in this project.
designBrief.heroStyle: Soft gradient background, refined serif heading, subtle shimmer effect
designBrief.uniqueElement: Service cards with gentle hover animations and price reveal
